subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath attained unto the lights of the Countenance, and hearkened unto the Call when it was raised from Mine all-highest horizon, and acted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز بانوار الوجه و سمع الندآء اذ ارتفع من افقی الاعلی و عمل
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @call to action, @personal instructions, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
